goal: Pivot from full-surface directional prediction to base-conditional overlays (veto, early-cut, hold-extension) that improve the quality of already-selected base trades on BTCUSDT.
global_constraints: Base snapshot active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never retune its logic, thresholds, hours, days, or execution parameters.
Full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features is terminally closed (v4–v7 verdict).
No regression on future PnL. No classifier-transition standalone layer. No raw event / static IV directional ideas.
No feature/label/threshold/architecture selection on lockbox — selection OOS only.
Overlay models train only on trade-level datasets; never on anchor-level surfaces.
All comparisons vs base must be matched: same trade windows, same notionals, strict overlay evaluation.
Labels frozen before training. Thresholds not tuned on lockbox. Purge gap ≥ 24h between windows.
One route at a time: veto first, early-cut only if veto shows signal, extension only if underheld winners found.
Any improvement claim requires matched lockbox OOS comparison vs immutable base.

slices.title: Closure-audit v7 и фиксация инвариантов v8
slices.hypothesis: Formally record the terminal verdict of v7 full-surface classification, open the v8 research project, and fix immutable reference + research map axes.
slices.objective: Formally record the terminal verdict of v7 full-surface classification, open the v8 research project, and fix immutable reference + research map axes.
success_criteria: v8 research project is open with recorded v7 verdict.
Research map axes and open-items register created.
evidence_requirements: v8 research project is open with recorded v7 verdict.
Research map axes and open-items register created.

slices.title: Построить trade-surface atlas immutable base
slices.hypothesis: Build the trade-level atlas from the immutable base, transitioning from anchor-level to trade-level thinking, with full entry/exit/path/context records per trade.
slices.objective: Build the trade-level atlas from the immutable base, transitioning from anchor-level to trade-level thinking, with full entry/exit/path/context records per trade.
success_criteria: Complete trade-level atlas with all required fields populated.
Cross-section analytics produced for long/short, winners/losers, exit reasons.
Worst-decile, fragile, and underheld-winner subsets identified.
evidence_requirements: Complete trade-level atlas with all required fields populated.
Cross-section analytics produced for long/short, winners/losers, exit reasons.
Worst-decile, fragile, and underheld-winner subsets identified.

slices.title: Freeze overlay label contracts
slices.hypothesis: Define and freeze all overlay label schemas (veto, early-cut, extension) plus ambiguity policy before any model training begins.
slices.objective: Define and freeze all overlay label schemas (veto, early-cut, extension) plus ambiguity policy before any model training begins.
success_criteria: All label definitions formally recorded and frozen.
Ambiguity policy documented (near-zero, mixed, material improvement threshold).
evidence_requirements: All label definitions formally recorded and frozen.
Ambiguity policy documented (near-zero, mixed, material improvement threshold).
